# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure Virtual Machines running our web application. Include OS and data disks with default settings for quick deployment. Focus on getting VMs running - we'll add disk encryption and security features in phase 2 after validating the architecture.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

$schema: "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#"
contentVersion: "1.0.0.0"
parameters:
  vmName:
    type: string
  adminUsername:
    type: string
  adminPassword:
    type: securestring
  vmSize:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "Standard_DS1_v2"
  location:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "[resourceGroup().location]"
resources:
  - type: "Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines"
    apiVersion: "2022-03-01"
    name: "[parameters('vmName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    properties:
      hardwareProfile:
        vmSize: "[parameters('vmSize')]"
      osProfile:
        computerName: "[parameters('vmName')]"
        adminUsername: "[parameters('adminUsername')]"
        adminPassword: "[parameters('adminPassword')]"
      storageProfile:
        imageReference:
          publisher: "MicrosoftWindowsServer"
          offer: "WindowsServer"
          sku: "2019-Datacenter"
          version: "latest"
        osDisk:
          name: "[concat(parameters('vmName'), '-osdisk')]"
          caching: "ReadWrite"
          createOption: "FromImage"
          managedDisk:
            storageAccountType: "Standard_LRS"
        dataDisks:
          - caching: "ReadWrite"
            createOption: "Empty"
            diskSizeGB: 1024
            managedDisk:
              storageAccountType: "Standard_LRS"
      networkProfile:
        networkInterfaces:
          - id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces', concat(parameters('vmName'), '-nic'))]"
  - type: "Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces"
    apiVersion: "2022-05-01"
    name: "[concat(parameters('vmName'), '-nic')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    properties:
      ipConfigurations:
        - name: "ipconfig1"
          properties:
            subnet:
              id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks', 'yourVnetName')/subnets/default]"
            publicIPAddress:
              id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses', concat(parameters('vmName'), '-ip'))]"
  - type: "Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses"
    apiVersion: "2022-05-01"
    name: "[concat(parameters('vmName'), '-ip')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    properties:
      publicIPAllocationMethod: "Dynamic"
